name: runtime_closeout_summary
primary_question: What bounded runtime closeout posture does the committed historical wave-receipt snapshot represent, and how did its reviewed handoff land?
derivation_rule: aggregate only historical runtime_wave_closeout_receipt payloads by program_id and wave_id and keep the latest gate plus handoff posture without aliasing current trial or return contracts
authority_ceiling: Weaker than Checkpoint center law, historical owner wave records, and current trial or return contracts; this compatibility snapshot does not describe current runtime closeout state.
